channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Misguided Empathy Is Killing Us
item.description: Our distortion of empathy is bringing us closer to societal suicide.

item.title: Ending Racial Bias in Admissions
item.description: The Trump administration is taking forceful action to expose and punish this egregious violation of civil rights by universities in the name of promot...

item.title: President Trump’s Opportunity to Bring Home Jimmy Lai
item.description: With this week’s meeting with Xi Jinping, Trump can turn a campaign promise into action.

item.title: Canada’s Sovereign Malinvestment Fund
item.description: Prime Minister Carney is attempting failed industrial policy again under a different name.
